name: Gym Membership Agreement & Liability Waiver
description: A contract outlining gym membership rules, payment terms, and a strict waiver of liability assuming exercise risks.
content:
GYM MEMBERSHIP AGREEMENT & WAIVER OF LIABILITY

This Agreement is made on {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and between {{gym_name}} ("Gym"), located at {{gym_address}}, and the undersigned {{member_name}} ("Member").

1. MEMBER INFORMATION

Name: {{member_name}}
ID/Passport: {{member_id}}
DOB: {{formatDate member_dob}}
Address: {{member_address}}
Phone: {{member_phone}}
Email: {{member_email}}

{{#if (eq is_minor 'Yes')}}

Guardian Info: {{guardian_name}} (Phone: {{guardian_phone}})

{{/if}}

2. MEMBERSHIP DETAILS

Membership Type: {{membership_type}}
Start Date: {{formatDate start_date}}
Duration: {{duration_number}} {{duration_unit}}
Expiration Date: {{formatDate end_date}}

3. FEES AND PAYMENT

The total fee for the membership period is {{total_fee}}.
Payment Method: {{payment_method}}

4. GYM RULES & CANCELLATION

The Member agrees to abide by all facility rules, including but not limited to:

{{gym_rules}}

Cancellation & Freeze Policy:

{{cancellation_policy}}

5. ASSUMPTION OF RISK & WAIVER OF LIABILITY

The Member (and Guardian, if applicable) acknowledges and agrees to the following:

  • I represent that I am in good physical health and have no medical condition that would prevent my full participation in exercise activities.
  • I understand that exercise and the use of gym equipment inherently involve risks of injury, including severe injury or death. I ASSUME ALL RISKS associated with my use of the facility.

I HEREBY RELEASE, WAIVE, AND DISCHARGE {{gym_name}}, ITS OWNERS, DIRECTORS, AND EMPLOYEES FROM ANY AND ALL LIABILITY, CLAIMS, OR CAUSES OF ACTION ARISING OUT OF ANY INJURY, DAMAGE, OR LOSS SUSTAINED BY ME IN CONNECTION WITH MY USE OF THE GYM AND ITS EQUIPMENT, EVEN IF CAUSED BY THE NEGLIGENCE OF THE GYM.

I have read, understood, and voluntarily signed this Agreement and Waiver of Liability.

Gym Representative

{{gym_representative}}


Signature: _________________________

Member

{{member_name}}

{{#if (eq is_minor 'Yes')}}
Signature: _________________________



Guardian

{{guardian_name}}

{{/if}}
Signature: _________________________

fields.name: gym_rules
fields.label: Gym Rules (Summary)
fields.placeholder: Wipe down equipment, wear proper shoes, etc.

fields.name: cancellation_policy
fields.label: Cancellation & Freeze Policy
fields.placeholder: 30-day notice required for cancellation, no refunds, etc.
